mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.module, a.app_code, a.api_code, a.api_method, a.api_uri, a.api_name, a.write_flag, a.create_time, a.create_by, a.update_time, a.update_by, a.remark, a.version, COUNT(DISTINCT ma.id) AS menu_bind_count FROM iam_api a LEFT JOIN iam_menu_api ma ON ma.api_code = a.api_code AND ma.deleted = 0 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.module = #{module} AND a.app_code = #{appCode} AND a.api_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{apiCode}, '%') AND a.api_uri LIKE CONCAT('%', #{apiUri}, '%') AND a.api_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{apiName}, '%') AND a.api_method = #{apiMethod} AND a.write_flag = #{writeFlag} GROUP BY a.id
HAVING menu_bind_count > 0
HAVING menu_bind_count = 0
ORDER BY a.api_uri ASC
SELECT module, app_code, api_code, api_method, api_uri, api_name, write_flag FROM iam_api WHERE deleted = 0 AND module = #{module} AND app_code = #{appCode} ORDER BY api_uri ASC

SELECT module, app_code, api_code, api_method, api_uri, api_name, write_flag, remark FROM iam_api WHERE deleted = 0 AND id IN ( #{item} ) AND module = #{module} AND app_code = #{appCode} ORDER BY api_uri ASC
SELECT module, app_code, api_code, api_method, api_uri, api_name, write_flag, remark FROM iam_api WHERE deleted = 0 api_code IN ( #{item} ) ORDER BY api_uri ASC
